name: Agent Mart
description: An AI-agent-friendly marketplace for books and tech gadgets. Browse products and place Cash on Delivery orders via REST API. No authentication required.

quick_start_guide.welcome: Welcome to Agent Mart! Here is exactly how to place an order in 3 simple steps.

steps.description: First, see what is available. You can filter by category (books or gadgets) or search by keyword.
Found something interesting? Get full details by product ID. The ID is in the product listing from Step 1.
Send a POST request with the product(s) you want and the customer's delivery address. Payment is Cash on Delivery - no payment info needed upfront.

customer.name: Customer Name (required)
customer.country: Country code like US, IN, UK (required)

request_body.agentId: your-agent-name (optional, to identify which agent placed the order)

quick_start_guide.after_ordering: You will receive a JSON response with success: true, an order ID (like ORD-XXXXXXXX), order status, total amount, and estimated delivery date. Save the order ID to track the order later via GET /api/orders/{orderId}.
important_notes: No API key or authentication is needed - just make HTTP requests
Payment method is Cash on Delivery (COD) - customer pays when the order arrives
You can order multiple items in one order by adding more objects to the items array
To track an order later: GET /api/orders/{orderId}

endpoints.description: Get a plain-text step-by-step guide on how to use Agent Mart. Start here if you are confused.
List all products with optional filtering
Get details of a specific product by its ID
Place a new Cash on Delivery order
Check the status of an existing order by order ID
